# groundcover_monitor_v2 (Resource)

Manages a groundcover Monitor with a typed Terraform schema. This resource avoids the raw YAML blob used by `groundcover_monitor` and supports GCQL, MetricsQL, and raw SQL query definitions.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "groundcover_monitor_v2" "gcql_logs" {
  title            = "GCQL Logs Error Count"
  severity         = "critical"
  measurement_type = "event"
  is_paused        = true

  display {
    header      = "GCQL Logs Error Count"
    description = "Fires when error logs are observed in the evaluation window."
    context_header_labels = [
      "cluster",
      "namespace",
      "workload",
    ]
  }

  query {
    type           = "gcql"
    data_type      = "logs"
    expression     = "level:error | stats count() count_all_result"
    instant_rollup = "5m"
  }

  threshold {
    name       = "threshold_1"
    input_name = "threshold_input_query"
    operator   = "gt"
    values     = [10]
  }

  evaluation_interval {
    interval    = "1m"
    pending_for = "5m"
  }

  notification_settings {
    method                  = "connectedApps"
    connected_apps          = ["slack-connected-app-id"]
    status_filters          = ["Alerting", "Resolved"]
    renotification_interval = "4h"
    disable_renotification  = false
    connected_app_params = {
      "slack-connected-app-id" = {
        channels = ["C0123456789"]
      }
    }
  }

  execution_error_state = "OK"
  no_data_state         = "OK"
}

resource "groundcover_monitor_v2" "gcql_traces" {
  title            = "GCQL Traces Count"
  severity         = "warning"
  measurement_type = "event"
  is_paused        = true

  display {
    header      = "GCQL Traces Count"
    description = "Counts traces returned by GCQL."
  }

  query {
    type           = "gcql"
    data_type      = "traces"
    expression     = "* | stats count() count_all_result"
    instant_rollup = "5m"
  }

  threshold {
    name       = "threshold_1"
    input_name = "threshold_input_query"
    operator   = "gt"
    values     = [1000]
  }

  evaluation_interval {
    interval    = "1m"
    pending_for = "1m"
  }

  execution_error_state = "OK"
  no_data_state         = "OK"
}

resource "groundcover_monitor_v2" "gcql_events" {
  title            = "GCQL Events Count"
  severity         = "warning"
  measurement_type = "event"
  is_paused        = true

  display {
    header      = "GCQL Events Count"
    description = "Counts events returned by GCQL."
  }

  query {
    type           = "gcql"
    data_type      = "events"
    expression     = "* | stats count() count_all_result"
    instant_rollup = "5m"
  }

  threshold {
    name       = "threshold_1"
    input_name = "threshold_input_query"
    operator   = "gt"
    values     = [1000]
  }

  evaluation_interval {
    interval    = "1m"
    pending_for = "1m"
  }

  execution_error_state = "OK"
  no_data_state         = "OK"
}

resource "groundcover_monitor_v2" "gcql_apm" {
  title            = "GCQL APM Count"
  severity         = "warning"
  measurement_type = "event"
  is_paused        = true

  display {
    header      = "GCQL APM Count"
    description = "Counts APM records returned by GCQL."
  }

  query {
    type           = "gcql"
    data_type      = "apm"
    expression     = "* | stats count() count_all_result"
    instant_rollup = "5m"
  }

  threshold {
    name       = "threshold_1"
    input_name = "threshold_input_query"
    operator   = "gt"
    values     = [1000]
  }

  evaluation_interval {
    interval    = "1m"
    pending_for = "1m"
  }

  execution_error_state = "OK"
  no_data_state         = "OK"
}

resource "groundcover_monitor_v2" "metricsql" {
  title            = "MetricsQL Running Pods"
  severity         = "warning"
  measurement_type = "state"
  is_paused        = true

  display {
    header      = "MetricsQL Running Pods"
    description = "Evaluates a MetricsQL query through the Prometheus datasource."
  }

  query {
    type       = "metricsql"
    expression = "sum(groundcover_kube_pod_container_status_running{})"

    relative_timerange {
      from = "-5m"
      to   = "0m"
    }

    rollup {
      function = "last"
      time     = "5m"
    }
  }

  reducer {
    name       = "last_reducer"
    input_name = "threshold_input_query"
    type       = "last"
  }

  threshold {
    name       = "threshold_1"
    input_name = "last_reducer"
    operator   = "gt"
    values     = [1000]

    custom_resolve_threshold {
      operator = "lt"
      values   = [900]
    }
  }

  evaluation_interval {
    interval    = "1m"
    pending_for = "1m"
  }

  execution_error_state = "OK"
  no_data_state         = "OK"
}

resource "groundcover_monitor_v2" "raw_sql" {
  title            = "Raw SQL Constant Query"
  severity         = "warning"
  measurement_type = "event"
  is_paused        = true

  display {
    header      = "Raw SQL Constant Query"
    description = "Evaluates a raw SQL query through the ClickHouse datasource."
  }

  query {
    type       = "raw_sql"
    query_type = "instant"
    expression = "SELECT 0 AS count_all_result"
  }

  threshold {
    name       = "threshold_1"
    input_name = "threshold_input_query"
    operator   = "gt"
    values     = [0]
  }

  evaluation_interval {
    interval    = "1m"
    pending_for = "1m"
  }

  execution_error_state = "OK"
  no_data_state         = "OK"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `measurement_type` (String) Type of measurement evaluated by the monitor.
- `severity` (String) Monitor severity.
- `title` (String) Monitor title.

### Optional

- `annotations` (Map of String) Annotations to attach to the monitor and resulting alerts. The `_gc_monitor_v2_query_type` and `_gc_data_type` keys are reserved for provider-managed Monitor V2 state and cannot be configured.
- `auto_resolve` (Boolean) Whether the monitor should auto-resolve.
- `category` (String) Monitor category.
- `display` (Block, Optional) Display metadata shown in monitor issues. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--display))
- `evaluation_interval` (Block, Optional) Monitor evaluation interval and pending duration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--evaluation_interval))
- `execution_error_state` (String) State to enter if query execution fails.
- `is_paused` (Boolean) Whether the monitor is paused.
- `labels` (Map of String) Labels to attach to the monitor and resulting alerts.
- `no_data_state` (String) State to enter when the query returns no data.
- `notification_settings` (Block, Optional) Notification behavior for this monitor. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--notification_settings))
- `query` (Block, Optional) Required. Single query evaluated by the monitor. Use `type = "gcql"`, `type = "metricsql"`, or `type = "raw_sql"`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--query))
- `reducer` (Block List) Reducers that aggregate or transform query results before threshold evaluation. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--reducer))
- `routing` (List of String) Routing destinations for the monitor.
- `team` (String) Team associated with the monitor.
- `threshold` (Block List) Required. Thresholds that decide when the monitor fires. At least one threshold block must be configured. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--threshold))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Monitor identifier (UUID).

<a id="nestedblock--display"></a>
### Nested Schema for `display`

Optional:

- `context_header_labels` (List of String) Labels shown in the context header.
- `description` (String) Issue description.
- `header` (String) Issue header.
- `resource_header_labels` (List of String) Labels shown in the resource header.
- `template_language` (String) Template language for header and description.


<a id="nestedblock--evaluation_interval"></a>
### Nested Schema for `evaluation_interval`

Optional:

- `interval` (String) How often the monitor evaluates, for example `1m`.
- `pending_for` (String) How long the condition must remain true before alerting, for example `5m`.


<a id="nestedblock--notification_settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `notification_settings`

Optional:

- `connected_app_params` (Attributes Map) Per-connected-app delivery options keyed by connected app ID. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--notification_settings--connected_app_params))
- `connected_apps` (List of String) Connected app IDs to notify.
- `disable_renotification` (Boolean) Whether renotification is disabled.
- `method` (String) Notification method.
- `renotification_interval` (String) Duration between renotifications, for example `4h`.
- `status_filters` (List of String) Issue statuses that should notify.

<a id="nestedatt--notification_settings--connected_app_params"></a>
### Nested Schema for `notification_settings.connected_app_params`

Optional:

- `channels` (List of String) Slack channel IDs to notify for this connected app.



<a id="nestedblock--query"></a>
### Nested Schema for `query`

Required:

- `expression` (String) Query expression.
- `type` (String) Query language/type. Supported values: `gcql`, `metricsql`, `raw_sql`.

Optional:

- `data_type` (String) GCQL data type. Required when `type = "gcql"`. Supported values: `logs`, `traces`, `events`, `apm`.
- `datasource_id` (String) Optional datasource identifier for raw queries.
- `datasource_type` (String) Metrics datasource type for MetricsQL. Defaults to `prometheus` when `type = "metricsql"`.
- `instant_rollup` (String) GCQL rollup window used to add the monitor evaluation time bucket, for example `5m` or `5 minutes`.
- `name` (String) Query name. Defaults to `threshold_input_query`.
- `query_type` (String) Query execution type for MetricsQL or raw SQL. Defaults to `instant`.
- `relative_timerange` (Block, Optional) Relative time range for this query, reducer, or threshold. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--query--relative_timerange))
- `rollup` (Block, Optional) MetricsQL rollup. Required for MetricsQL queries. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--query--rollup))

<a id="nestedblock--query--relative_timerange"></a>
### Nested Schema for `query.relative_timerange`

Optional:

- `from` (String) Start of the relative range, for example `-5m`.
- `to` (String) End of the relative range, for example `0m`.


<a id="nestedblock--query--rollup"></a>
### Nested Schema for `query.rollup`

Optional:

- `function` (String) Rollup function.
- `time` (String) Rollup time window, for example `5m` or `1 hour`.



<a id="nestedblock--reducer"></a>
### Nested Schema for `reducer`

Required:

- `type` (String) Reducer type.

Optional:

- `expression` (String) Math expression when `type = "math"`.
- `input_name` (String) Query or reducer output name to use as input.
- `name` (String) Reducer output name.
- `relative_timerange` (Block, Optional) Relative time range for this query, reducer, or threshold. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--reducer--relative_timerange))

<a id="nestedblock--reducer--relative_timerange"></a>
### Nested Schema for `reducer.relative_timerange`

Optional:

- `from` (String) Start of the relative range, for example `-5m`.
- `to` (String) End of the relative range, for example `0m`.



<a id="nestedblock--threshold"></a>
### Nested Schema for `threshold`

Required:

- `input_name` (String) Query or reducer output name to evaluate.
- `name` (String) Threshold name.
- `operator` (String) Threshold comparison operator.
- `values` (List of Number) Numeric threshold values.

Optional:

- `custom_resolve_threshold` (Block, Optional) Optional custom recovery threshold used to reduce alert flapping. Supported only with `gt`, `lt`, `within_range`, and `outside_range` firing operators. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--threshold--custom_resolve_threshold))
- `relative_timerange` (Block, Optional) Relative time range for this query, reducer, or threshold. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--threshold--relative_timerange))

<a id="nestedblock--threshold--custom_resolve_threshold"></a>
### Nested Schema for `threshold.custom_resolve_threshold`

Optional:

- `operator` (String) Recovery comparison operator.
- `values` (List of Number) Numeric recovery threshold values.


<a id="nestedblock--threshold--relative_timerange"></a>
### Nested Schema for `threshold.relative_timerange`

Optional:

- `from` (String) Start of the relative range, for example `-5m`.
- `to` (String) End of the relative range, for example `0m`.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
terraform import groundcover_monitor_v2.example "<id>"
```
